fact_text: Left NZ Herald in May 2025 after almost two decades as Political Editor to become Chief Media and Communications Adviser to the NZ Police Commissioner
Left TVNZ/1News in early 2024 to join ANZ Bank as Head of Government Relations and Corporate Responsibility after serving as Political Editor and Press Gallery Chair/Deputy Chair
Left TVNZ in April 2025 to join Infrastructure New Zealand as Director of Advocacy and Policy after more than two decades in journalism
Moved from NZ Herald to Newstalk ZB Political Editor then to TVNZ 1News Business Correspondent (replacing Katie Bradford)
Left journalism to work in public relations in London for several years before returning as deputy political reporter at The Post in September 2025; runs the 'Museum Street' politics newsletter
Chief Correspondent at TVNZ/1News; announced in late 2025 to join RNZ Morning Report in 2026
Political journalist Duncan Garner served as best man at Espiner's 2012 wedding to Emma Wehipeihana

'Textgate' (2013): exchanged 86 emails over 13 days with Revenue Minister Peter Dunne about GCSB leak inquiry; Dunne resigned; a subsequent inquiry improperly accessed Vance's phone records AND parliamentary swipe card movement data — a major NZ privacy scandal
Named unfavourably in Jacinda Ardern's 2025 memoir for his coverage of her government; was a personal friend of PM John Key
